items.name_en: 【YSL Saint Laurent Premium Replica】Produced by overseas factories, original overseas stock, original factory hardware and leather, passes customs and counters easily. For high-end customers only. Medium size, counter best-seller. Logo buckle flip-top shoulder and crossbody bag. Leather uses original authentic fine grain toothpick grain Box calfskin, which is the best part of top-grade leather. Hand-rolled using an ancient method to preserve the natural feel, so the hand feel and flexibility are excellent, not too delicate, relatively durable. Front features a flip-top with a rotating YSL metal buckle. The new "L" letter opens half up and half down, designed by a famous watchmaker. The logo rotates open. A brand-new improved metal closure design that fits perfectly. Features elegant rounded leather quilting piping. Exquisite handcrafting. Adjustable leather shoulder strap, very comfortable to wear. Interior features a three-layer accordion pocket and a thoughtful card slot, easily accommodating daily essentials. Wear it elegantly on the shoulder or casually crossbody. The simple design and smooth lines make the style very versatile. Paired with the classic retro gold copper logo, it's truly a bag you'll love the more you look at it!
